name: remogram-agent-support
description: Reusable remogram agent skills for forge-fact workflows in consumer repos and remogram product development.

interface.shortDescription: Forge-fact skills for remogram CLI and MCP in any configured repository.
interface.longDescription: Use remogram-consumer for day-to-day forge reads in repos with .remogram.json. Use remogram-core for remogram product work and remogram-dogfood when developing remogram itself with Topogram SDLC on remo.
